mapper.sql: sk.id, sk.skill_code, sk.skill_name, sk.domain_type, sk.skill_type, sk.description, sk.status, sk.owner_user_id, sk.update_time, ver.id AS published_version_id, ver.version_no AS published_version_no, ver.publish_status, bind.base_id, kb.base_name

LEFT JOIN ai_skill_version ver ON ver.skill_id = sk.id AND ver.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' LEFT JOIN ai_skill_kb_binding bind ON bind.skill_version_id = ver.id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = bind.base_id AND kb.is_deleted = FALSE

sql.if: AND (sk.skill_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%') OR sk.skill_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT FROM ai_skill sk
WHERE sk.is_deleted = FALSE
ORDER BY sk.update_time DESC, sk.id DESC

SELECT FROM ai_skill sk INNER JOIN ai_skill_version ver ON ver.skill_id = sk.id AND ver.publish_status = 'PUBLISHED' LEFT JOIN ai_skill_kb_binding bind ON bind.skill_version_id = ver.id LEFT JOIN ai_knowledge_base kb ON kb.id = bind.base_id AND kb.is_deleted = FALSE WHERE sk.is_deleted = FALSE AND sk.status = 1
AND (sk.skill_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%') OR sk.skill_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{request.keywords}, '%'))
AND sk.domain_type = #{request.domainType}
ORDER BY sk.update_time DESC, sk.id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_skill WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = FALSE
SELECT * FROM ai_skill WHERE skill_code = #{skillCode} AND is_deleted = FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill (skill_code, skill_name, domain_type, skill_type, description, status, owner_user_id, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted) VALUES (#{skillCode}, #{skillName}, #{domainType}, #{skillType}, #{description}, #{status}, #{ownerUserId}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{isDeleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill SET skill_code=#{skillCode}, skill_name=#{skillName}, domain_type=#{domainType}, skill_type=#{skillType}, description=#{description}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime}, update_user=#{updateUser} WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=FALSE
UPDATE ai_skill SET status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime}, update_user=#{updateUser} WHERE id=#{id} AND is_deleted=FALSE
